metadata.title: PR Mastery: The Language of Collaboration

scenes.text: Watch the original clip to understand the context of Pull Requests.
Now, pay attention to these three key terms used in the video.

scenes.definition: A formal plan or suggestion put forward for consideration.
scenes.it_example: A Pull Request is a proposal to change the code.

scenes.definition: To combine two or more things together into one.
scenes.it_example: We will merge your branch after the final review.
scenes.image_prompt: two data streams joining into one

scenes.definition: To work jointly on an activity or project.
scenes.it_example: Developers use PRs to collaborate on new features.

scenes.text: Listening Challenge: Watch again without subtitles. Can you hear the keywords?
